rules: Use MiniMax M2.7 Pro first for routine collection and independent reference reviews.
Use free NVIDIA models as fallback or low-cost reference reviewers when available.
Use the stronger aggregator only for synthesis, risk decisions, and final policy interpretation.
Never let reference agents sign, broadcast, call wallet tools, or access secrets.
Do not spawn a 49-agent council for trading.
Escalate model count only for material uncertainty and within the preset cap.
Record provider, model, token budget, latency, failure, and cost metadata in evidence.
